summary: Iteration 100: Comprehensive testing of System Resilience Dashboard, Advanced Analytics Export, and Cashfree Payment endpoints. All 38 backend API tests passed (100%). Fixed critical frontend build error in SystemResilienceDashboard.js. Mobile and tablet responsive design verified working.

ui_bugs.issue: Minor React hydration warning about span inside tbody - cosmetic issue from dev tools overlay

integration_issues.issue: Payment button click shows raw JSON response instead of opening Cashfree checkout - UI flow issue
affected_selectors: Buy Now button on billing page

action_items: Frontend: Handle Cashfree payment response properly - open Cashfree checkout with paymentSessionId instead of showing JSON
Minor: React hydration warning in SystemResilienceDashboard table - cosmetic only
critical_code_review_comments: FIXED: SystemResilienceDashboard.js had wrong import path for AuthContext - Changed to use localStorage directly like other admin pages
FIXED: Admin role check was looking for user.isAdmin but API returns user.role='ADMIN' - Added proper role check

success_rate.frontend: 95% (System Resilience Dashboard working, all tabs functional, responsive design working)

context_for_next_testing_agent: All System Resilience Dashboard APIs working (dashboard, auto-refunds, self-healing incidents, circuit breakers, worker metrics). Analytics Export APIs working (formats, template-analytics, revenue-report, system-health, quick-stats). Cashfree payment APIs working. Frontend SystemResilienceDashboard fixed and functional. Mobile/tablet responsive design verified. Payment flow needs frontend handling to open Cashfree checkout.

system_resilience_dashboard.ui_test: PASS - All tabs working, refresh button working, health score displayed

responsive_design.mobile: PASS - 390px viewport, all elements visible and functional

load_test_reference.summary: 100 users, 41% success rate under heavy load - expected for preview environment
